raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Das btja feptinxus Gad-\
dus wezz/ kad tas par\
Kehnixu tappe/ un wal-\
diia tschetrde+mits Gaddus Je-\
rusalemê/ un wixxa Mahtei bi-\
a Zibea Wahrdã no Bersabas.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joas darrija/ kas tam\
KUNGA M labbi patikke/ ka-\
mehr tas Preesteris Jojadus\
dsihwoja.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jojadus nehme tam\
wiwi Seewas/ un tas dsemdi-\
naja Dehlus un Meitas.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to apnehmahs Joas\
awa Sirði ta KUNGA Nam-\
mu atjaunaht.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch fapulzinaja tohs\
Preesterus un Lewitus/ un fazzi-\
a us teem : Iseita Juhda Pils-\
ahtôs/ un fakrahjeet Naudu no\
wiffa Israëta / juhu Deewa\
Nammu atkat stiprinaht ik Gad-\
us/ un juhs steidseetees pee\
Schahs Leetas/ bet tee Lewiti ne\
steidsehs.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnixch aiztnaja\
Jojadu to Wirfneeku/ un fazzija\
us to : Kapehz tu ne efi us teem\
Lewiteem randsijs/ ka teem bij\
no Juhda un Jerusalemes fa-\
raht to Meslo Naudu/ ko Moh-\
us tas KUNGA Kalps nospree-\
dts/ ka tai Israëta Drandsibai\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo kad Atalija besdeewigi\
turrejahs/ tad bija winnas Deh-\
li to Deewa Nammu pohstiifschi/\
ir wiffas fwehtas Leetas no ra\
KUNGA Namma teem Bâ-\
lim peelikkutchi.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pawehleja tas Keh-\
ninsch/ ka teem bij weennu Schkir-\
stu darriht/ un tee likke to ahra\
pee ta KUNGA Namna Wahrtim.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un eeftch Juhda un Jeru-\
salemes tappe issaukts/ ka bij\
tam KUNGA M atnest to Met-\
lo Naudu/ ko Mohsus tas Dee-\
wa Kalps Israëtam Tuksnesi\
nospreedis.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad preezajahs wiffi Lee-\
lt-Kungi un wiffi Laudis/ un tee\
atnesfe un mette to tai Schkir-\
sta/ tamehr tas pilns tappe.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Laiks bija/ ka to\
Schkirstu bij pehz ta Kehnixa\
Pawehleschanas zaur teem Lewi-\
teem atnest / kad tee redseja/ ka\
dands Naudas eekcha bija/ tad\
nahze ta Kehnixa Skrihweris/\
un tas/ kas no ta augsta Pree-\
stera bija eezelts/ un istukchoja\
to Schkirstu/ un usnehme to /\
un nefte to atkat sawa Weeta/\
ta darrija tee ik Laika/ ka tee\
dands Naudas fakrahje.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to paschu dewe tas\
Kehnixch un Jojadus teem\
Wehrmindereem/ kas ta KUN-\
GA Namma Darbu apkohpe /\
un tee paschi faderreja Afminu-\n"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
